mnemonics: SPJ-U (Select, Project, Join, Union) - The core operators of relational algebra.
keyPoints: SELECT (σ) is used to choose rows based on a condition.
PROJECT (π) is used to select specific columns from a relation.
JOIN (⨝) combines tuples from two relations based on a related column.
commonMistakes: Confusing PROJECT (π) with SELECT (σ); PROJECT chooses columns, SELECT chooses rows.
Forgetting that a NATURAL JOIN requires attributes with the same name in both relations.
Using UNION (∪) on relations that are not union-compatible (same number and type of columns).
